description: Identify the river station with the maximum flood depth (calculated as Peak Water Surface Elevation minus Minimum Channel Elevation) using the Muncie simulation results in Muncie.p04.tmp.hdf. Generate a plot of this critical cross-section showing the terrain profile, peak water surface elevation as a filled blue area, and bank stations. Save the plot as a PNG to /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/critical_section_plot.png, ensuring the plot title includes the River Station ID. Additionally, save a text report containing the River Station ID and the calculated maximum depth in feet to /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/critical_section_info.txt.
